info.name: Amazon Neptune Neptune Analytics API
Graphs
Amazon Neptune List Neptune Analytics Graphs

params.name: maxResults
params.description: Maximum number of results to return.

params.name: nextToken
params.description: Pagination token from a previous request.

items.docs: Returns a list of Neptune Analytics graph resources in the account.

info.name: Amazon Neptune Create a Neptune Analytics Graph

items.docs: Creates a new Neptune Analytics graph resource. The graph is a memory-optimized database instance optimized for analytical workloads with support for openCypher queries and vector search.

info.name: Amazon Neptune Get Neptune Analytics Graph Details

params.name: graphIdentifier
params.description: The unique identifier of the graph.

items.docs: Returns detailed information about a specific Neptune Analytics graph resource.

info.name: Amazon Neptune Update a Neptune Analytics Graph

params.name: graphIdentifier
params.description: The unique identifier of the graph.

items.docs: Updates the configuration of an existing Neptune Analytics graph, such as provisioned memory or deletion protection settings.

info.name: Amazon Neptune Delete a Neptune Analytics Graph

params.name: graphIdentifier
params.description: The unique identifier of the graph to delete.

params.name: skipSnapshot
params.description: Whether to skip creating a final snapshot before deletion.

items.docs: Deletes a Neptune Analytics graph resource. The graph must not have deletion protection enabled.

info.name: Amazon Neptune Reset a Neptune Analytics Graph

params.name: graphIdentifier
params.description: The unique identifier of the graph to reset.

items.docs: Empties the data from a Neptune Analytics graph, removing all nodes and edges while preserving the graph resource and its configuration.

info.name: Graph Snapshots
Amazon Neptune List Graph Snapshots

params.name: graphIdentifier
params.description: Filter snapshots by source graph identifier.

items.docs: Returns a list of graph snapshots in the account.

info.name: Amazon Neptune Create a Graph Snapshot

items.docs: Creates a snapshot of a Neptune Analytics graph for backup purposes.

info.name: Amazon Neptune Get Graph Snapshot Details

params.name: snapshotIdentifier
params.description: The unique identifier of the snapshot.

items.docs: Returns detailed information about a specific graph snapshot.

info.name: Amazon Neptune Delete a Graph Snapshot

params.name: snapshotIdentifier
params.description: The unique identifier of the snapshot to delete.

items.docs: Deletes a Neptune Analytics graph snapshot.

info.name: Amazon Neptune Restore a Graph from a Snapshot

params.name: snapshotIdentifier
params.description: The identifier of the snapshot to restore from.

items.docs: Creates a new Neptune Analytics graph by restoring from an existing snapshot.

info.name: Import Tasks
Amazon Neptune List Import Tasks

items.docs: Returns a list of import tasks in the account.

info.name: Amazon Neptune Create a Graph Using an Import Task

items.docs: Creates a new Neptune Analytics graph and populates it with data from an Amazon S3 source in a single operation.

info.name: Amazon Neptune Get Import Task Details

params.name: taskIdentifier
params.description: The unique identifier of the import task.

items.docs: Returns detailed information about a specific import task.

info.name: Amazon Neptune Cancel an Import Task

params.name: taskIdentifier
params.description: The unique identifier of the import task to cancel.

info.name: Private Graph Endpoints
Amazon Neptune List Private Graph Endpoints

items.docs: Returns a list of private graph endpoints for a specific graph.

info.name: Amazon Neptune Create a Private Graph Endpoint

params.name: graphIdentifier
params.description: The unique identifier of the graph.

items.docs: Creates a private graph endpoint in a VPC for accessing a Neptune Analytics graph without going over the public internet.

info.name: Amazon Neptune Get Private Graph Endpoint Details

params.name: vpcId
params.description: The VPC ID of the private endpoint.

items.docs: Returns details of a specific private graph endpoint.

info.name: Amazon Neptune Delete a Private Graph Endpoint

items.docs: Deletes a private graph endpoint from a VPC.
